title: Ctenodon langlassei
taxonomy: Ctenodon langlassei is a species within the plant family Apocynaceae. This plant is classified as a shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Its classification includes being part of the order Gentianales and the clade Asterids. Further classification includes being in the clade Campanulidae and the clade Bilateralia. This shrub's classification demonstrates its unique characteristics and relationships among other plant species.
